description: Letter from Avraham b. Shemuel ha-Levi, Jerusalem, to Nissim ha-Kohen Ṣefanya b. ʿOvadya ha-Kohen, Fustat/Cairo. Mainly in Judaeo-Arabic and Hebrew. Dated: 6 Kislev 5439 AM (בקשו ענוה) = 21 November 1678 CE. Both writer and addressee are Qaraites. There are remnants of a red (wax?) seal on verso. This is a very long letter; needs further examination.
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic מירושלים לקהיר. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
